General.Name: WK Group (Holdings) Ltd
General.Description: WK Group (Holdings) Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the provision of structural steelwork services in Hong Kong. It is involved in the supply, fabrication, and installation of structural steel for construction projects. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong. WK Group (Holdings) Limited operates as a subsidiary of WK (BVI) Limited.
